subcodes.first_line: The Mystery of God hath verily appeared in truth from a hallowed and resplendent horizon, and He hath manifested Himself in the Temple of the Youth. Blessed be God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سر الله قد ظهر بالحق عن افق قدس بهیا و انه قد ظهر علی هیکل الغلام فتبارک الله
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun
